final:
module rc_oscillator(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst)
            out <= 0;
        else
            out <= ~out;  // Toggle output
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
